languages.text: "Вы могли бы помочь мне управлять протекторатом. Ваш опыт дорогого стоит".
"You could help me rule the protectorate. Your experience is invaluable."
languages.original_text: "Вы могли бы помочь мне управлять протекторатом. Ваш опыт дорогого стоит".

traits.locale_text: "You could help me rule the protectorate. Your experience is highly valuable."
"You could help me rule the protectorate. Your experience is highly valuable."
"You could help me rule the protectorate. Your experience is invaluable."
"You could help me rule the protectorate. Your experience is invaluable."

languages.text: "Ihr könntet mir helfen, das Protektorat zu regieren. Eure Erfahrung ist unbezahlbar."
languages.original_text: "You could help me rule the protectorate. Your experience is invaluable."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr könntet mir helfen, das Protektorat zu regieren. Eure Erfahrung ist unbezahlbar."

languages.text: « Vous pourriez m'aider à diriger le protectorat. Votre expérience est un atout précieux. »
languages.original_text: "You could help me rule the protectorate. Your experience is invaluable."

traits.locale_text: « Vous pourriez m'aider à diriger le protectorat. Votre expérience est un atout précieux. »

languages.text: «Podría ayudarme a gobernar el protectorado. Su experiencia tiene un valor incalculable».
languages.original_text: "You could help me rule the protectorate. Your experience is invaluable."

traits.locale_text: «Podría ayudarme a gobernar el protectorado. Su experiencia tiene un valor incalculable».

languages.text: "Protektorayı yönetmeme yardım edebilirsin. Tecrüben paha biçilemez."
languages.original_text: "You could help me rule the protectorate. Your experience is invaluable."

traits.locale_text: "Protektorayı yönetmeme yardım edebilirsin. Tecrüben paha biçilemez."

languages.text: “你可以帮我治理属地。你的经验很宝贵。”
languages.original_text: "You could help me rule the protectorate. Your experience is invaluable."

traits.locale_text: “你可以帮我治理属地。你的经验很宝贵。”

languages.text: 「君が俺の側でプロテクトラートを治めるのを手伝ってくれる。君の経験は非常に貴重だ。」
languages.original_text: "You could help me rule the protectorate. Your experience is invaluable."

traits.locale_text: 「君が俺の側でプロテクトラートを治めるのを手伝ってくれる。君の経験は非常に貴重だ。」
